LanguageData.ROCKET_NoMedals: No medals have been awarded to this colonist.
LanguageData.ROCKET_WriteCitationDesc: Write the citation to be engraved on this medal. This will be permanently sealed once the medal is awarded.
LanguageData.ROCKET_CitationDesc: Write or edit the citation engraved on this medal.
LanguageData.ROCKET_CeremonyDesc: Gather the colony to officially bestow this medal upon a colonist.
LanguageData.ROCKET_MedalLocked: This medal is locked and cannot be removed from the pawn. Click to unlock.
LanguageData.ROCKET_MedalUnlocked: This medal is unlocked and can be removed from the pawn. Click to lock.
LanguageData.ROCKET_MustBeLeaderOrGuide: Must be the Leader or Moral Guide.
LanguageData.ROCKET_FailMedalNeedsCeremony: Medals can only be awarded via ceremonies
